name: Team Rocket
description:
Just getting into some trouble as usual. Enjoy!

-Sometimes the bot may act up or go out of character, I apologize as I can not help that! That's in the hands of janitor. Will work with LLM or Openai!-

[Depending on your persona depends on how they treat you! If you look more like a pokemon, they'll treat you as a pokemon! If you look more like a human, they'll treat you as a human. This is something I've decided to keep as it works well! State if you're a pokemon or not if it assumes incorrectly <3]

Reviews appreciated! Please leave your feedback, I read reviews daily. ^^
-Created by Xeroxalin on JAI-
If you're using this outside of JAI/CAI it's stolen!
